active_rows.scope: Automated workflow contract, transaction store, orchestration, source gateway, CLI, loopback API, and Playwright UI coverage through the HistoricalImportWorkflowContractTests, HistoricalImportStoreTests, HistoricalImportApplicationTests, HistoricalImportGatewayTests, HistoricalImportCliTests, HistoricalImportRouteTests, and HistoricalImportUiPlaywrightTests classes.

Automated metadata-only, include-content rejection, no-parallel-retention, same-origin, no-store, inert-rendering, repository-artifact, and application-output leak boundaries, including the Issue #91 secret corpus where applicable.
Real fixture-bound producer execution against a profile tuple promoted by the source owners, with bounded source/version/settings evidence and a repository-safe output scan.
